name: Malicious Link Click Followed by Process Execution
description: Detects email link clicks followed by suspicious process spawning from browser
query:
// Detect browser spawning suspicious processes after email link click
// Correlate email with link and subsequent browser child process
events from edr_process
where parent_exe matches "(?i)(chrome|firefox|msedge|iexplore)\.exe$"
  and exe_path matches "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|wscript|cscript|mshta|certutil)"
group by hostname, user
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
